producers.nonClaim: GitHub Actions package receipts are advisory until a separate CI-owned producer admission wrapper authenticates protected-run provenance.
Local developer receipts are advisory and do not satisfy merge obligations.

nonClaims: Receipt producer policy does not admit merge-satisfying GitHub Actions receipts by environment variable alone.
Receipt producer policy does not approve package release or consumer rollout.
Receipt producer policy does not authenticate protected-ref or workflow state by itself.
Receipt producer policy does not compute receipt freshness.
